center.name: Kakamega Forest
center.summary: Kakamega Forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Monteiro's bushshrike，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Angola and Cameroon, with a historical record from the Albertine Rift of eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo and a lost specimen from Kakamega Forest, Kenya.{{cite web |last1=Fry |first1=Hilary |last2=Sharpe |first2=Chris |editor1-last=del Hoyo |editor1-first=J
